title: Carrion (disambiguation)
content:
'''Carrion''' may refer to one of the following:

*[[Ice scrabbler/Legends|Carrion]], a synonym for the ice scrabbler creature
*[[Carrion sector/Legends|Carrion sector]], a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]
*[[Carrion Spike (location)|Carrion Spike]], a wildlife reserve near the [[Tarkin family]]'s [[Tarkin family compound|compound]] on [[Eriadu]]
*The ''[[Carrion Spike]]'', the corvette of [[Wilhuff Tarkin]] named after the reserve

{{Disambig}}
